# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"', description: 'Build command to execute')
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No test command specified"', description: 'Test command to execute')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deploy command specified"', description: 'Deploy command to execute')
        text(name: 'PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Script to run before build')
        text(name: 'POST_BUILD_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Script to run after build')
        text(name: 'PRE_TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Script to run before tests')
        text(name: 'POST_TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Script to run after tests')
        text(name: 'PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Script to run before deployment')
        text(name: 'POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Script to run after deployment')
        string(name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Working directory for commands')
        string(name: 'BUILD_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '60', description: 'Build timeout in minutes')
        string(name: 'TEST_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Test timeout in minutes')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '45', description: 'Deploy timeout in minutes')
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_BUILD', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip build stage')
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_TESTS', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip test stage')
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip deploy stage')
        booleanParam(name: 'FAIL_FAST', defaultValue: true, description: 'Fail pipeline on first error')
        booleanParam(name: 'CLEANUP_WORKSPACE', defaultValue: false, description: 'Clean workspace before build')
        choice(name: 'SHELL_TYPE', choices: ['bash', 'sh', 'zsh'], description: 'Shell interpreter to use')
        text(name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES', defaultValue: '', description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)')
        text(name: 'ADDITIONAL_COMMANDS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Additional commands to run at the end')
    }
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_DIR = "${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
        SHELL_INTERPRETER = "${params.SHELL_TYPE}"
    }
    
    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Pipeline Initialization ==="
                    echo "Build Command: ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Test Command: ${params.TEST_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Deploy Command: ${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
                    echo "Shell Type: ${params.SHELL_TYPE}"
                    
                    if (params.CLEANUP_WORKSPACE) {
                        echo "Cleaning workspace..."
                        cleanWs()
                    }
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES?.trim()) {
                        echo "Setting custom environment variables..."
                        def envVars = params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.split('\n')
                        envVars.each { line ->
                            if (line.trim() && line.contains('=')) {
                                def parts = line.split('=', 2)
                                env."${parts[0].trim()}" = parts[1].trim()
                                echo "Set ${parts[0].trim()}=${parts[1].trim()}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Build') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_BUILD && params.PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Pre-Build Script ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.BUILD_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                            set -e
                            ${params.PRE_BUILD_SCRIPT}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_BUILD }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Build Command ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.BUILD_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            if (params.FAIL_FAST) {
                                sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                                set -e
                                ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}
                                """
                            } else {
                                sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                                ${params.BUILD_COMMAND}
                                """
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Build') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_BUILD && params.POST_BUILD_SCRIPT?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Post-Build Script ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.BUILD_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                            set -e
                            ${params.POST_BUILD_SCRIPT}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Test') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_TESTS && params.PRE_TEST_SCRIPT?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Pre-Test Script ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.TEST_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                            set -e
                            ${params.PRE_TEST_SCRIPT}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Test Command ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.TEST_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            if (params.FAIL_FAST) {
                                sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                                set -e
                                ${params.TEST_COMMAND}
                                """
                            } else {
                                sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                                ${params.TEST_COMMAND}
                                """
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Test') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_TESTS && params.POST_TEST_SCRIPT?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Post-Test Script ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.TEST_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                            set -e
                            ${params.POST_TEST_SCRIPT}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_DEPLOY && params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Pre-Deploy Script ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.DEPLOY_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                            set -e
                            ${params.PRE_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Deploy Command ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.DEPLOY_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            if (params.FAIL_FAST) {
                                sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                                set -e
                                ${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}
                                """
                            } else {
                                sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                                ${params.DEPLOY_COMMAND}
                                """
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_DEPLOY && params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Post-Deploy Script ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        timeout(time: params.DEPLOY_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                            sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                            set -e
                            ${params.POST_DEPLOY_SCRIPT}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Additional Commands') {
            when {
                expression { params.ADDITIONAL_COMMANDS?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Executing Additional Commands ==="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        if (params.FAIL_FAST) {
                            sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                            set -e
                            ${params.ADDITIONAL_COMMANDS}
                            """
                        } else {
                            sh """#!/${params.SHELL_TYPE}
                            ${params.ADDITIONAL_COMMANDS}
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo "=== Pipeline Completed Successfully ==="
        }
        failure {
            echo "=== Pipeline Failed ==="
        }
        always {
            echo "=== Pipeline Execution Finished ==="
        }
    }
}
